acceptance_dimensions.name: originality
acceptance_dimensions.description: Novel contribution to the field; new framework, new evidence, or unique perspective; not a restatement of existing work.

acceptance_dimensions.name: methodological_rigor
acceptance_dimensions.description: Research design matches the question; method is appropriate, replicable, and limitations are disclosed.

acceptance_dimensions.name: evidence_sufficiency
acceptance_dimensions.description: Every claim is supported by adequate citations or data; no unsupported assertions; no cherry-picking.

acceptance_dimensions.name: argument_coherence
acceptance_dimensions.description: Logic flows across sections; transitions are smooth; thesis-to-conclusion alignment holds; no self-contradiction.

acceptance_dimensions.name: writing_quality
acceptance_dimensions.description: Language is clear and precise; grammar, formatting, and citation style are consistent; readability fits the venue.

per_dimension_criteria.what_to_look_for: Introduction's contribution statement names a specific gap; Discussion engages prior work substantively (not list-citation); Literature Review identifies the gap the paper fills.
per_dimension_criteria.what_triggers_block: Contribution statement is vague or absent; Discussion lists prior work without engagement; paper restates known conclusions in a new context with no added evidence.
per_dimension_criteria.what_triggers_warn: Contribution exists but is weakly differentiated from cited prior work; Discussion engagement is uneven across cited sources.

per_dimension_criteria.what_to_look_for: Method is named and justified against the research question; sample / data sources are appropriate; analysis steps are described in enough detail for replication; limitations are explicit.
per_dimension_criteria.what_triggers_block: Method does not match the research question; significant design flaws; limitations are not discussed; analysis cannot be replicated from the description.
per_dimension_criteria.what_triggers_warn: Method is fundamentally sound but insufficiently detailed; some choices lack justification; limitations are mentioned but not engaged with.

per_dimension_criteria.what_to_look_for: Every factual claim carries a citation; cited sources are appropriate quality for the field; inferences in Discussion stay within what the data supports.
per_dimension_criteria.what_triggers_block: Multiple core claims lack evidence; over-reliance on a single source; Discussion inferences exceed what the data supports; cherry-picking of favorable evidence.
per_dimension_criteria.what_triggers_warn: Core claims have evidence but some secondary claims lack support; citation density is uneven across sections.

per_dimension_criteria.what_to_look_for: Introduction's research question is answered in the Conclusion; section-to-section transitions are present; thesis statement is consistent across Abstract, Introduction, and Conclusion.
per_dimension_criteria.what_triggers_block: Multiple logical gaps between sections; conclusion disconnected from the introduction's research question; self-contradictory passages.
per_dimension_criteria.what_triggers_warn: Overall logic holds but some transitions feel forced; minor inconsistencies between section claims.

per_dimension_criteria.what_to_look_for: Register is consistently academic; grammar errors are rare; citation format is internally consistent; figures and tables are referenced in text.
per_dimension_criteria.what_triggers_block: Difficult to understand; numerous grammar errors; colloquial register; citation format inconsistent across the manuscript.
per_dimension_criteria.what_triggers_warn: Readable but with several grammar or word-choice issues; some paragraphs overly long; minor citation format inconsistencies.

failure_conditions.expression: one or more mandatory dimensions score 'warn'
the evaluator's own scoring plan triggers 'warn' on a high or normal-priority dimension AND no mandatory dimension scores 'block' or 'warn'
round 2 still shows mandatory-dimension block after a writer revise_in_phase_4b attempt
every mandatory dimension scores 'pass' AND no dimension scores 'block'
